title: FMD - Both earbuds connected
scenario: Find My Device correctly shows Voyager Free 60/60+ or Voyager Free 20 as a single device on the map when both earbuds are connected
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your mobile device.
2. Ensure both earbuds (Voyager Free 60/60+ or Voyager Free 20) are connected to the app.
4. Locate and tap on the 'Find My Device' feature.
5. Observe the map view that appears.
6. Check the location marker shown on the map.
expected: The device is correctly recognized on the map as a single device marker.
